name: Coffee Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 2/3 cups extra strong coffee, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
Note: If you would like to serve this sauce chilled, omit butter and refrigerate after the sauce has thickened.
1. In a heavy skillet, melt the sugar slowly, stirring often until it is a light amber color, about 5 minutes.
2. Slowly add 1 1/3 cups of the coffee, stirring constantly. Be prepared for a lot of steam.
3. In a small bowl, blend the cornstarch and the remaining 1/3 cup of coffee until smooth.
4. Stir this mixture into the hot coffee-sugar mixture.
5. Continue cooking over low heat and stir until the sauce boils and thickens, about 8 to 10 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the butter and salt until blended.
7. Serve warm over ice cream.
